d!d"
d#d$
d%d&
distutils.errors
Provides exceptions used by the Distutils modules.  Note that Distutils
modules may raise standard exceptions; in particular, SystemExit is
usually raised for errors that are obviously the end-user's fault
(eg. bad command-line arguments).
This module is safe to use in "from ... import *" mode; it only exports
symbols whose names start with "Distutils" and end with "Error".c
DistutilsErrorz
The root of all Distutils evil.N
__name__
__module__
__qualname__
__doc__
@/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/setuptools/_distutils/errors.pyr
DistutilsModuleErrorz
Unable to load an expected module, or to find an expected class
    within some module (in particular, command modules and classes).Nr
DistutilsClassErrorz
Some command class (or possibly distribution class, if anyone
    feels a need to subclass Distribution) is found not to be holding
    up its end of the bargain, ie. implementing some part of the
    "command "interface.Nr
DistutilsGetoptErrorz7The option table provided to 'fancy_getopt()' is bogus.Nr
DistutilsArgErrorzaRaised by fancy_getopt in response to getopt.error -- ie. an
    error in the command line usage.Nr
DistutilsFileErrorz
Any problems in the filesystem: expected file not found, etc.
    Typically this is for problems that we detect before OSError
    could be raised.Nr
DistutilsOptionErrora
Syntactic/semantic errors in command options, such as use of
    mutually conflicting options, or inconsistent options,
    badly-spelled values, etc.  No distinction is made between option
    values originating in the setup script, the command line, config
    files, or what-have-you -- but if we *know* something originated in
    the setup script, we'll raise DistutilsSetupError instead.Nr
DistutilsSetupErrorzqFor errors that can be definitely blamed on the setup script,
    such as invalid keyword arguments to 'setup()'.Nr
DistutilsPlatformErrorz
We don't know how to do something on the current platform (but
    we do know how to do it on some platform) -- eg. trying to compile
    C files on a platform not supported by a CCompiler subclass.Nr
DistutilsExecErrorz`Any problems executing an external program (such as the C
    compiler, when compiling C files).Nr
DistutilsInternalErrorzoInternal inconsistencies or impossibilities (obviously, this
    should never be seen if the code is working!).Nr
DistutilsTemplateErrorz%Syntax error in a file list template.Nr
DistutilsByteCompileErrorz
Byte compile error.Nr
CCompilerErrorz#Some compile/link operation failed.Nr
PreprocessErrorz.Failure to preprocess one or more C/C++ files.Nr
CompileErrorz2Failure to compile one or more C/C++ source files.Nr
LibErrorzKFailure to create a static library from one or more C/C++ object
    files.Nr
	LinkErrorz]Failure to link one or more C/C++ object files into an executable
    or shared library file.Nr
UnknownFileErrorz(Attempt to process an unknown file type.Nr
	Exceptionr
